Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests

Class OperatorString

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests.OperatorString
public abstract class OperatorString extends Object
Class used to avoid repetition of those following constants in tests' class.
